headline: Public Storage Releases 2026 Sustainability Report
summary: FRISCO, Texas, June 29, 2026--Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) announced today the release of its 2026 Sustainability Report. The report highlights the Company’s continued dedication to sustainability, and details how its engaged and talented team, innovative and efficient operations, and disciplined financial strategy support long-term resilience, growth, and value creation.
